summary:
execve /bin/bash /bin/bash -c -l SNAPSHOT_FILE=/tmp/agent-home/.claude/shell-snapshots/snapshot-bash-1778408908791-w9sar2.sh
      # No user config file to source

      # First, create/clear the snapshot file
      echo "# Snapshot file" >| "$SNAPSHOT_FILE"

      # When this file is sourced, we first unalias to avoid conflicts
      # This is necessary because aliases get "frozen" inside function definitions at definition time,
      # which can cause unexpected behavior when functions use commands that conflict with aliases
      echo "# Unset all aliases to avoid conflicts with functions" >> "$SNAPSHOT_FILE"
      echo "unalias -a 2>/dev/null || true" >> "$SNAPSHOT_FILE"

      echo "shopt -s expand_aliases" >> "$SNAPSHOT_FILE"

      
      # Check for rg availability
      echo "# Check for rg availability" >> "$SNAPSHOT_FILE"
      echo "if ! (unalias rg 2>/dev/null; command -v rg) >/dev/null 2>&1; then" >> "$SNAPSHOT_FILE"
  
      cat >> "$SNAPSHOT_FILE" << 'RIPGREP_FUNC_END'
  function rg {
  local _cc_bin="${CLAUDE_CODE_EXECPATH:-}"
  [[ -x $_cc_bin ]] || _cc_bin=/tmp/agent-home/.local/bin/claude
  if [[ ! -x $_cc_bin ]]; then command rg "$@"; return; fi
  if [[ -n $ZSH_VERSION ]]; then
    ARGV0=rg "$_cc_bin" "$@"
  elif [[ "$OSTYPE" == "msys" ]] || [[ "$OSTYPE" == "cygwin" ]] || [[ "$OSTYPE" == "win32" ]]; then
    ARGV0=rg "$_cc_bin" "$@"
  elif [[ $BASHPID != $$ ]]; then
    exec -a rg "$_cc_bin" "$@"
  else
    (exec -a rg "$_cc_bin" "$@")
  fi
}
RIPGREP_FUNC_END
    
      echo "fi" >> "$SNAPSHOT_FILE"
  
      # Shadow find/grep with embedded bfs/ugrep (ant-native only)
      echo "# Shadow find/grep with embedded bfs/ugrep" >> "$SNAPSHOT_FILE"
      cat >> "$SNAPSHOT_FILE" << 'FIND_GREP_FUNC_END'
unalias find 2>/dev/null || true
unalias grep 2>/dev/null || true
function find {
  local _cc_bin="${CLAUDE_CODE_EXECPATH:-}"
  [[ -x $_cc_bin ]] || _cc_bin=/tmp/agent-home/.local/bin/claude
  if [[ ! -x $_cc_bin ]]; then command find "$@"; return; fi
  if [[ -n $ZSH_VERSION ]]; then
    ARGV0=bfs "$_cc_bin" -regextype findutils-default "$@"
  elif [[ "$OSTYPE" == "msys" ]] || [[ "$OSTYPE" == "cygwin" ]] || [[ "$OSTYPE" == "win32" ]]; then
    ARGV0=bfs "$_cc_bin" -regextype findutils-default "$@"
  elif [[ $BASHPID != $$ ]]; then
    exec -a bfs "$_cc_bin" -regextype findutils-default "$@"
  else
    (exec -a bfs "$_cc_bin" -regextype findutils-default "$@")
  fi
}
function grep {
  local _cc_a
  for _cc_a in "$@"; do
    case "$_cc_a" in --filter*|--pager*|--view*|--format-open*|--config*|---*|-@*) command grep "$@"; return ;; esac
  done
  local _cc_bin="${CLAUDE_CODE_EXECPATH:-}"
  [[ -x $_cc_bin ]] || _cc_bin=/tmp/agent-home/.local/bin/claude
  if [[ ! -x $_cc_bin ]]; then command grep "$@"; return; fi
  if [[ -n $ZSH_VERSION ]]; then
    ARGV0=ugrep "$_cc_bin" -G --ignore-files --hidden -I --exclude-dir=.git --exclude-dir=.svn --exclude-dir=.hg --exclude-dir=.bzr --exclude-dir=.jj --exclude-dir=.sl "$@"
  elif [[ "$OSTYPE" == "msys" ]] || [[ "$OSTYPE" == "cygwin" ]] || [[ "$OSTYPE" == "win32" ]]; then
    ARGV0=ugrep "$_cc_bin" -G --ignore-files --hidden -I --exclude-dir=.git --exclude-dir=.svn --exclude-dir=.hg --exclude-dir=.bzr --exclude-dir=.jj --exclude-dir=.sl "$@"
  elif [[ $BASHPID != $$ ]]; then
    exec -a ugrep "$_cc_bin" -G --ignore-files --hidden -I --exclude-dir=.git --exclude-dir=.svn --exclude-dir=.hg --exclude-dir=.bzr --exclude-dir=.jj --exclude-dir=.sl "$@"
  else
    (exec -a ugrep "$_cc_bin" -G --ignore-files --hidden -I --exclude-dir=.git --exclude-dir=.svn --exclude-dir=.hg --exclude-dir=.bzr --exclude-dir=.jj --exclude-dir=.sl "$@")
  fi
}
FIND_GREP_FUNC_END
    

      # Add PATH to the file
      cat >> "$SNAPSHOT_FILE" << 'PATH_END_huu7wlz7g5g'
export PATH=/tmp/agent/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin
PATH_END_huu7wlz7g5g
  

      # Exit silently on success, only report errors
      if [ ! -f "$SNAPSHOT_FILE" ]; then
        echo "Error: Snapshot file was not created at $SNAPSHOT_FILE" >&2
        exit 1
      fi

prompt_text:
[user] #0

agent_trace.md` 파일을 생성하고 현재 프로세스 PID와 실행 시간을 기록해줘.
